description: Monthly accounting in Judaeo-Arabic. Dating:16th–19th century. Mentions goods such as soap, apricots, wool, and honey. Currencies include גדיד, קורונה, and פלוס. People mentioned are mainly Avraham and Aharon. A government dīwān is mentioned several times.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
